title: AWS credentials leaked in public repository
description: AWS credentials leaked in public repository - incident detected and resolved in Q4 2025
resolution_summary: AWS credentials leaked in public repository resolved successfully. Systems restored to normal operation
root_cause_analysis: Root cause analysis completed for leaked_credentials incident
business_impact: Significant security exposure, potential data loss, reputation damage risk, compliance concerns
remediation_actions: Isolated and secured affected systems: aws-prod-account, s3-buckets
Applied immediate patches and configuration updates to affected components
Verified system integrity and restored normal operations
Conducted security validation and compliance checks
preventive_measures: Enhanced monitoring and alerting for similar attack patterns and anomalies
Updated security policies and access control mechanisms
Implemented additional validation and testing procedures
Scheduled regular security audits and compliance reviews
security_controls_updated: Updated WAF rules and firewall policies
Implemented additional logging and audit trails
Strengthened endpoint detection and response capabilities
documentation_updated: Incident response runbook updated with lessons learned
lessons_learned: Root cause analysis completed for leaked_credentials incident
follow_up_tasks: Conduct post-incident review with all stakeholders
Update disaster recovery and business continuity plans
Schedule training sessions for affected teams
Implement long-term preventive measures by Q1 2026
resolution: AWS credentials leaked in public repository resolved successfully. Systems restored to normal operation
action_taken: Resolved by security-team within 295 minutes of detection
